attacking_style: Specializes in perfectly timed short-range attacks (300m) on uphill finishes, particularly after long breakaways or from reduced groups. Shows exceptional positioning sense to beat faster finishers on steep gradients (16%+).
team_tactics: Elite mountain domestique who sets sustained tempo (20+ km) on penultimate climbs to control GC races. Can also operate as opportunistic breakaway option when team has no immediate GC stakes, targeting KOM jerseys through km-0 aggression.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient finishes (16%+) and high-altitude climbing where sustained tempo riding is decisive. Strong technical descender in wet conditions. Multi-week races suit him better as form builds.
vulnerability: Exposed when required to respond to accelerations rather than set tempo. Lost polka dot jersey when facing explosive climbers. Abandoned Paris-Nice 2018 while second overall, suggesting fragility under multi-day pressure.
key_patterns: 300m uphill finish attacks repeated successfully (Vuelta 2023, Dauphine 2019), exploiting positioning over power
Breaks from km-0 to secure KOM points (Tour 2021 multiple stages), relentless early aggression pattern
Sustained 20km+ pacemaking on penultimate climbs as elite domestique (Vuelta 2019, Giro 2022, Tour 2017)
Unexpected ITT strength for pure climber (Paris-Nice 2018 win), technical cornering advantage in rain
Exploits massive breakaways for GC position when favorites hesitate (Vuelta 2022: outside top-20 to 9th overall)
Late-race form improvement in Grand Tours, moving up GC consistently in final week
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Vuelta showed evolved tactical maturity with two stage finish wins using 300m attacks after 80km+ efforts, demonstrating peak combination of endurance and finishing power
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 16
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20
